title: Xtra Rich Spanish Foie Gras Gambas Al Ajillo
description: A mustardy and pillowy Spanish dish featuring foie gras, this Basque-inspired recipe is a hangover cure, served in a traditional Talavera plate, and is egg-free friendly.
instructions: Heat the butter in a large skillet over medium heat until melted and foamy.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the prawns and cook for 2-3 minutes per side until pink and cooked through.
Remove the prawns from the skillet and set aside on a plate.
Add the sherry wine, chicken broth, Dijon mustard, paprika, salt, and black pepper to the skillet.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 5 minutes until reduced and syrupy.
Add the sliced foie gras to the skillet and cook for 1 minute per side until seared and cooked through.
Return the prawns to the skillet and toss to coat with the sauce.
Stir in the lemon juice and cook for an additional minute.
Serve the gambas al ajillo in a traditional Talavera plate, garnished with parsley and lemon wedges.
